title: LSTMCell accepts malformed hidden state and segfaults

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Pass a tensor with shape (2, 3, 3) as the hidden-state argument instead of the expected hx tuple.
expected: PyTorch should reject the malformed hidden state with a clear Python-level exception.
observed: The process terminates with Segmentation fault.
